content: Check users from the list to import into {{organizationName}} {{productName}}. Users already existing in {{organizationName}} {{productName}} are highlighted with a green color and are not checked by default.

comment.text: This translation key is used to display a description for selecting users to import into {{organizationName}} {{productName}}, indicating which users have already been imported and are highlighted in green. It appears on a UI component related to file or data import.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'входирате' is a non-existent word/incorrect transliteration. The correct term for 'to import' in this context is 'импортирате'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Проверете потребителите от списъка, за да импортирате в {{organizationName}} {{productName}}. Вече съществуващите потребители в {{organizationName}} {{productName}} са маркирани със зелен цвят и не са избрани по подразбиране.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The translation states that existing users are highlighted with a 'wrong color' (virheellä värillä) instead of 'green color' (vihreällä värillä).
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Valitse {{organizationName}} {{productName}}:n tuotavat käyttäjät listalta. Jo {{organizationName}} {{productName}}-ssa olemassaolevat käyttäjät on korostettu vihreällä värillä, eikä niitä ole oletuksena valittu.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The translation of 'are not checked by default' as 'ບໍ່ໄດ້ຖືກກວດສອບຕາມຄ່າເລີ່ມຕົ້ນ' means 'are not inspected/verified by default'. In the context of a selection list, 'checked' refers to the checkbox state (selected). The Lao translation should use a term related to 'selecting' or 'marking' to avoid confusion with 'verifying/inspecting'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: ກວດເບິ່ງຜູ້ໃຊ້ຈາກລາຍຊື່ເພື່ອນໍາເຂົ້າເຂົ້າໄປໃນ {{organizationName}} {{productName}}. ຜູ້ໃຊ້ທີ່ມີຢູ່ແລ້ວຢູ່ໃນ {{organizationName}} {{productName}} ຈະຖືກເນັ້ນໃສ່ດ້ວຍສີຂຽວ ແລະບໍ່ໄດ້ຖືກເລືອກໄວ້ຕາມຄ່າເລີ່ມຕົ້ນ.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'Verifique' in Portuguese means 'Verify' or 'Check' (as in to inspect), whereas in this UI context 'Check' means 'to tick/select a checkbox'. 'Selecione' is the correct term for selecting items from a list.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Selecione os usuários da lista para importar para o {{organizationName}} {{productName}}. Os usuários já existentes no {{organizationName}} {{productName}} são destacados em verde e não estão selecionados por padrão.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'Verifique' in Portuguese means 'Verify' or 'Check' (as in inspect), whereas in this UI context, 'Check' means 'to select/tick a checkbox'. Using 'Verifique' is misleading for a user selection action.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Selecione os usuários da lista para importar para o {{organizationName}} {{productName}}. Os usuários já existentes no {{organizationName}} {{productName}} são destacados em verde e não estão selecionados por padrão.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'exstenți' is a spelling error (should be 'existenți'), but more importantly, the gender agreement is incorrect. 'Utilizatorii' is masculine, but the adjective 'evidențiate' is feminine plural.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Bifați utilizatorii din listă pentru a le importa în {{organizationName}} {{productName}}. Utilizatorii deja existenți în {{organizationName}} {{productName}} sunt evidențiați cu verde și nu sunt bifați în mod implicit.
